productName: Papayahuasca ( I ) Chef Joe's - Flipside Distillate Disposable 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Papayahuasca oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of mango, diesel, and earthy, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
